title: A2A Message Envelope ADF v1.0
description: Agent-to-Agent protocol compliant envelope for Kyberion ADF payloads.

parent_id.description: Reference to a previous message ID

conversation_id.description: Mission ID or long-running task ID

performative.description: The speech act of this message

signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature for Sovereign approval

payload.description: The actual ADF instructions (intent, pipeline, or steps)
